mapper.insert: INSERT INTO accommodations ( host_user_id, name, address, region, info_text, check_in_time, check_out_time, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{hostUserId}, #{name}, #{address}, #{region}, #{infoText}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE accommodations SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, region = #{region}, info_text = #{infoText}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE accommodation_id = #{accommodationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_types ( accommodation_id, name, base_capacity, max_capacity, base_price, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{accommodationId}, #{name}, #{baseCapacity}, #{maxCapacity}, #{basePrice}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE room_types SET name = #{name}, base_capacity = #{baseCapacity}, max_capacity = #{maxCapacity}, base_price = #{basePrice}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE room_type_id = #{roomTypeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rooms ( accommodation_id, room_type_id, room_code, status, memo, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{accommodationId}, #{roomTypeId}, #{roomCode}, #{status}, #{memo}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE rooms SET room_code = #{roomCode}, status = #{status}, memo = #{memo}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
